gate.headline: Release Gate: HOLD because 1 novel incidents, 1 regression-new incidents, 2 unowned runnable packs block the release.
checklist: Stop the release and inspect the blocking packs first.
Confirm the novel incidents before assuming the release is only repeating known failures.
Inspect candidate-only regression incidents before widening the rollout or release exposure.
Patch missing runbooks so recalled owners are not operating without playbooks.
Inspect recurring hotspot files because one code path may explain several packs at once.

exportText:
=== release-2026-04-15 ===
>>> summary: Checkout profile payload dropped account metadata before render
>>> fix: Guard renderProfile before reading account.name
>>> owner: web-platform
>>> runbook: https://example.com/runbooks/profile-null
>>> seen-count: 3
>>> source-packs: checkout-prod, profile-rollout, billing-canary
TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'name')
    at renderProfile (/app/src/profile.js:88:17)
    at updateView (/app/src/view.js:42:5)
    at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)

=== release-2026-04-15-2 ===
>>> summary: Checkout profile payload dropped account metadata before render
>>> fix: Guard renderProfile before reading account.name
>>> owner: web-platform
>>> runbook: https://example.com/runbooks/profile-null
>>> seen-count: 1
>>> source-packs: billing-canary
TypeError: Cannot read properties of undefined (reading 'email')
    at renderInvoice (/app/src/invoice.js:19:7)
    at refreshBilling (/app/src/billing.js:57:3)
    at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)

=== profile-js-generic-runtime-error ===
>>> summary: No specific pattern matched, so focus on the failing inputs and recent changes around renderProfileState (/app/src/profile.js:102).
>>> seen-count: 1
>>> source-packs: profile-rollout
ProfileHydrationError: Profile payload missing account metadata
    at renderProfileState (/app/src/profile.js:102:9)
    at updateView (/app/src/view.js:42:5)
    at processTicksAndRejections (node:internal/process/task_queues:95:5)
